prompt:
You are shown the last 1-2 rendered pages (in order) of the region for "Item 1. Business". The next section is "Item 1A. Risk Factors".
Find where Item 1 ends — right before the "Item 1A" heading if it appears, otherwise the very bottom of the last page — and transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of Item 1 before that point. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text: From time to time, we may be involved in various claims and legal proceedings arising in the ordinary course of business. None of our Company or our subsidiaries is currently a party to any such claims or proceedings which, if decided adversely to the Company, would either, individually or in the aggregate, have a material adverse effect on our business, financial condition, results of operations or cash flows.
